recommendations.title: Looking for Richard
recommendations.overview: Al Pacino's deeply-felt rumination on Shakespeare's significance and relevance to the modern world through interviews and an in-depth analysis of "Richard III."

recommendations.title: Block-Heads
recommendations.overview: It's 1938, but Stan doesn't know the war is over; he's still patrolling the trenches in France, and shoots down a French aviator. Oliver sees his old chum's picture in the paper and goes to visit Stan who has now been returned to the States and invit

recommendations.title: Our Hospitality
recommendations.overview: A young man falls for a young woman on his trip home; unbeknownst to him, her family has vowed to kill every member of his family.

recommendations.title: Rocky
recommendations.overview: Rocky Balboa is a Philadelphia club fighter who seems to be going nowhere. But when a stroke of fate puts him in the ring with a world heavyweight champion, Rocky knows that it's his one shot at the big time — a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to go t

recommendations.title: 8 Seconds
recommendations.overview: This film chronicles the life of Lane Frost, 1987 PRCA Bull Riding World Champion, his marriage and his friendships with Tuff Hedeman (three-time World Champion) and Cody Lambert.

recommendations.title: The Karate Kid Part III
recommendations.overview: Despondent over the closing of his karate school, Cobra Kai teacher John Kreese joins a ruthless businessman and martial artist to get revenge on Daniel and Mr. Miyagi.

recommendations.title: The Power of One
recommendations.overview: PK, an English orphan terrorized for his family's political beliefs in Africa, turns to his only friend, a kindly world-wise prisoner, Geel Piet. Geel teaches him how to box with the motto “fight with your fists and lead with your heart”. As he grows

recommendations.title: Lean On Me
recommendations.overview: When principal Joe Clark takes over decaying Eastside High School, he's faced with students wearing gang colors and graffiti-covered walls. Determined to do anything he must to turn the school around, he expels suspected drug dealers, padlocks doors

recommendations.title: Rocky V
recommendations.overview: A lifetime of taking shots has ended Rocky’s career, and a crooked accountant has left him broke. Inspired by the memory of his trainer, however, Rocky finds glory in training and takes on an up-and-coming boxer.

recommendations.title: The Irishman: In Conversation
recommendations.overview: Martin Scorsese, Robert De Niro, Joe Pesci, and Al Pacino in conversation about The Irishman.
